mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO risk_event (event_id, trace_id, event_type, subject_type, subject_id, school_code, campus_code, risk_features, raw_payload, event_time) VALUES
(#{item.eventId}, #{item.traceId}, #{item.eventType}, #{item.subjectType}, #{item.subjectId}, #{item.schoolCode}, #{item.campusCode}, #{item.riskFeatures}, #{item.rawPayload}, #{item.eventTime})

INSERT IGNORE INTO risk_decision (decision_id, event_id, decision_action, risk_level, risk_score, matched_rule_codes, decision_reason) VALUES
(#{item.decisionId}, #{item.eventId}, #{item.decisionAction}, #{item.riskLevel}, #{item.riskScore}, #{item.matchedRuleCodes}, #{item.decisionReason})

INSERT IGNORE INTO risk_case (case_id, event_id, decision_id, school_code, campus_code, case_status, assignee_id, result, result_reason) VALUES
(#{item.caseId}, #{item.eventId}, #{item.decisionId}, #{item.schoolCode}, #{item.campusCode}, #{item.caseStatus}, #{item.assigneeId}, #{item.result}, #{item.resultReason})
